disc-architecture-01.prompt: Use an architecture studio website concept as the starting point and design the site structure, homepage visuals, project showcase modules, and an architectural visual direction.

disc-brand-01.prompt: Use the cultural arts center direction as inspiration and create a brand exploration with keywords, key visual direction, poster extensions, and social media visual proposals.

disc-character-01.prompt: Create a character design set around a creepy carnival figure, including character background, expression variations, costume elements, and scene mood suggestions.

disc-illustration-01.prompt: Use the cat tarot card theme as a reference and expand it into an illustration series with character concepts, card-face visual language, color suggestions, and extension directions.

disc-poster-01.prompt: Design a set of vintage car posters, social square versions, and title layout directions with a filmic mood and retro color palette.

disc-product-01.prompt: Create a product visual direction for a robotic hand, covering key visual composition, material direction, ecommerce display images, and product selling points.

disc-story-01.prompt: Build a 15 to 30 second storyboard around a music-emotion short film, including shot rhythm, emotional transitions, title cards, and visual style suggestions.

disc-ui-01.prompt: Use a post-apocalyptic cake shop website as inspiration and design the homepage information architecture, hero visual, product card style, and core color direction.

branding-cap-logo.prompt: Create a branded cap mockup that highlights logo embroidery, material texture, and streetwear appeal for an ecommerce hero image.
branding-cap-logo.title: Put your logo on a cap

branding-coffee-merch.prompt: Extend this coffee brand across cups, bags, and social avatars while keeping the brand premium and approachable, with mockup composition directions.
branding-coffee-merch.title: Design branded merch for your coffee shop

branding-logo-options.prompt: Create a minimal logo exploration for a sushi brand with three directions, color suggestions, usage scenarios, and distinct brand voices.
branding-logo-options.title: Generate logo options

design-bauhaus-poster.prompt: Design a Bauhaus-inspired music festival poster using geometric shapes, rhythmic typography, a limited palette, and a vertical mobile extension.
design-bauhaus-poster.title: Design a Bauhaus-inspired poster

design-ceramic-dinnerware.prompt: Create a visual proposal for a ceramic dinnerware set with Nordic minimal and wabi-sabi qualities, covering unified forms for bowls, plates, cups, and product display images.
design-ceramic-dinnerware.title: Design a ceramic dinnerware set

design-furniture.prompt: Explore a sculptural orange velvet lounge chair with a furniture concept poster, material closeups, and ecommerce hero image directions.
design-furniture.title: Experiment with furniture design

illustration-cat-tarot.prompt: Expand a cat tarot card theme into an illustration series with character setup, card-face visual language, border system, and merchandise extensions.
illustration-cat-tarot.title: Expand a cat tarot card series

illustration-character-poster.prompt: Create a character poster that unifies character setup, color personality, and supporting props for a designer toy brand intro page.
illustration-character-poster.title: Create a playful character poster

illustration-seaside-story.prompt: Illustrate a dreamy seaside adventure with atmospheric color, layered lighting, and cover title placement.
illustration-seaside-story.title: Illustrate a dreamy seaside story

storyboard-comic-sequence.prompt: Break an original rooftop chase scene, where a character leaps over neon signs on a rainy night, into a comic-style sequence with consistent character movement, ready to become a short-form animatic.
storyboard-comic-sequence.title: Create a comic-style sequence

storyboard-music-teaser.prompt: Plan a 15-second music teaser with shot order, emotional rhythm, subtitle beats, and the final logo reveal.
storyboard-music-teaser.title: Build a music teaser sequence

storyboard-product-teaser.prompt: Plan a six-shot product teaser storyboard focused on pacing, transitions, and the final title-card landing.
storyboard-product-teaser.title: Plan a 6-frame product teaser

ui-ai-waitlist.prompt: Design an AI product waitlist page that emphasizes futurism, trust, and conversion flow across desktop and mobile first screens.
ui-ai-waitlist.title: Build an AI product waitlist page

ui-cake-shop.prompt: Design a homepage for a post-apocalyptic cake shop with hero visuals, product cards, and CTA styling that feels strange and fun.
ui-cake-shop.title: Create a cake shop landing page

ui-fintech-dashboard.prompt: Create a fintech product homepage hero that highlights data trust, CTA hierarchy, and card-based metric layout.
ui-fintech-dashboard.title: Design a fintech dashboard hero

visual-engineering-drawings.prompt: Turn this product concept into professional engineering blueprint visuals with front view, isometric view, key dimensions, and annotation hierarchy for R&D or prototyping conversations.
visual-engineering-drawings.title: Generate professional engineering drawings

visual-magazine-cover.prompt: Turn this selfie into a fashion magazine cover concept while preserving the expression, adding cover headlines, subtitle hierarchy, color direction, and a more editorial layout.
visual-magazine-cover.title: Turn a selfie into a magazine cover

visual-superhero-comic.prompt: Design a vintage superhero comic page about an original city hero rescuing people in a night street scene, with four to six panels, speech bubbles, narration boxes, action lines, and consistent character action with a 1970s comic-paper feel.
visual-superhero-comic.title: Make a classic superhero comic strip

hero.subtitle: Your local AI design assistant, from idea to finished work.
